This tool significantly reduces annotation time and facilitates the scalable creation of high-quality ground-truth masks, accelerating dataset development for ocular anterior segment surgeries. We also demonstrate the model's strong zero-shot generalization to glaucoma trabeculectomy procedures, confirming its cross-procedural utility and potential for broader surgical applications. The trained model and annotation toolkit are released as open-source resources, establishing CataractSAM-2 as a foundation for expanding anterior ophthalmic surgical datasets and advancing real-time AI-driven solutions in medical robotics, as well as surgical video understanding.

摘要：我們介紹 CataractSAM-2，這是一個 Meta 的 Segment Anything Model 2 的領域適應擴展，旨在對白內障眼科手術視頻進行實時語義分割，並具有高精度。CataractSAM-2 位於計算機視覺和醫療機器人技術的交匯處，使得精確的術中感知成為可能，這對於機器人輔助和計算機引導的手術系統至關重要。此外，為了減輕手動標註的負擔，我們引入了一個互動式標註框架，該框架將稀疏提示與基於視頻的掩碼傳播相結合。這個工具顯著減少了標註時間，並促進了高質量真實標註掩碼的可擴展創建，加速了眼前節手術數據集的開發。我們還展示了模型對青光眼小梁切除術的強大零樣本泛化能力，證實了其跨手術的實用性和更廣泛手術應用的潛力。訓練好的模型和標註工具包作為開源資源發布，確立了 CataractSAM-2 作為擴展眼前眼科手術數據集和推進醫療機器人技術中實時 AI 驅動解決方案及手術視頻理解的基礎。

docs.title: Early Discoveries of Algorithmist I: Promise of Provable Algorithm Synthesis at Scale
docs.text:
2603.22363v1 by Janardhan Kulkarni

Designing algorithms with provable guarantees that also work well in practice remains difficult, requiring both mathematical reasoning and careful implementation. Existing approaches that bridge worst-case theory and empirical performance, such as beyond-worst-case analysis and data-driven algorithm selection, typically assume prior distributional knowledge or restrict attention to a fixed pool of algorithms. Recent progress in LLMs suggests a new possibility: provable algorithm synthesis on the fly. To study this, we built Algorithmist, an autonomous researcher agent on top of GitHub Copilot that runs a multi-agent research-and-review loop, with separate stages for idea generation, algorithm and proof development, proof-guided implementation, and review of proofs, code, and their alignment. We evaluate Algorithmist on research-level tasks in private data analysis and clustering. When asked to design practical methods that jointly satisfy privacy, approximation, and interpretability requirements, it produced provably sound and empirically effective algorithms, together with research-style writeups and audited implementations. It also found improved algorithms in some settings, explained principled barriers in others, and uncovered a subtle proof bug in prior published work. More broadly, our results suggest a new paradigm in which LLM systems generate research-paper-quality algorithmic artifacts tailored to each dataset and deployment setting. They also point to a proof-first code-synthesis paradigm, in which code is developed alongside a structured natural-language proof intermediate representation and kept aligned with it throughout synthesis.

摘要：設計具有可證明保證且在實踐中表現良好的算法仍然困難，這需要數學推理和仔細的實施。現有的橋接最壞情況理論和實證性能的方法，例如超越最壞情況分析和數據驅動的算法選擇，通常假設先前的分佈知識或將注意力限制在固定的算法池中。近期在大型語言模型（LLMs）方面的進展暗示了一種新可能性：即時可證明的算法合成。為了研究這一點，我們構建了Algorithmist，一個基於GitHub Copilot的自主研究代理，運行多代理的研究和審查循環，並設有分別的階段進行創意生成、算法和證明開發、證明引導的實施，以及對證明、代碼及其對齊的審查。我們在私有數據分析和聚類的研究級任務上評估了Algorithmist。當要求設計同時滿足隱私、近似和可解釋性要求的實用方法時，它產生了可證明的合理且在實證上有效的算法，並附上研究風格的寫作和經過審核的實施。在某些情況下，它還找到了改進的算法，解釋了其他情況中的原則性障礙，並揭示了先前已發表工作中的一個微妙證明錯誤。更廣泛地說，我們的結果暗示了一種新範式，其中大型語言模型系統生成針對每個數據集和部署設置量身定制的研究論文質量的算法工件。它們還指向一種以證明為先的代碼合成範式，其中代碼與結構化的自然語言證明中間表示一起開發，並在整個合成過程中保持對齊。

docs.title: Unveiling the Mechanism of Continuous Representation Full-Waveform Inversion: A Wave Based Neural Tangent Kernel Framework
docs.text:
2603.22362v1 by Ruihua Chen, Yisi Luo, Bangyu Wu, Deyu Meng

Full-waveform inversion (FWI) estimates physical parameters in the wave equation from limited measurements and has been widely applied in geophysical exploration, medical imaging, and non-destructive testing. Conventional FWI methods are limited by their notorious sensitivity to the accuracy of the initial models. Recent progress in continuous representation FWI (CR-FWI) demonstrates that representing parameter models with a coordinate-based neural network, such as implicit neural representation (INR), can mitigate the dependence on initial models. However, its underlying mechanism remains unclear, and INR-based FWI shows slower high-frequency convergence. In this work, we investigate the general CR-FWI framework and develop a unified theoretical understanding by extending the neural tangent kernel (NTK) for FWI to establish a wave-based NTK framework. Unlike standard NTK, our analysis reveals that wave-based NTK is not constant, both at initialization and during training, due to the inherent nonlinearity of FWI. We further show that the eigenvalue decay behavior of the wave-based NTK can explain why CR-FWI alleviates the dependency on initial models and shows slower high-frequency convergence. Building on these insights, we propose several CR-FWI methods with tailored eigenvalue decay properties for FWI, including a novel hybrid representation combining INR and multi-resolution grid (termed IG-FWI) that achieves a more balanced trade-off between robustness and high-frequency convergence rate. Applications in geophysical exploration on Marmousi, 2D SEG/EAGE Salt and Overthrust, 2004 BP model, and the more realistic 2014 Chevron models show the superior performance of our proposed methods compared to conventional FWI and existing INR-based FWI methods.

摘要：全波形反演（FWI）從有限的測量中估計波方程的物理參數，並已廣泛應用於地球物理勘探、醫學成像和無損檢測。傳統的 FWI 方法受到對初始模型準確性敏感的限制。最近在連續表示 FWI（CR-FWI）方面的進展表明，使用基於坐標的神經網絡（如隱式神經表示，INR）來表示參數模型，可以減輕對初始模型的依賴。然而，其潛在機制仍不清楚，基於 INR 的 FWI 顯示出較慢的高頻收斂。在本研究中，我們探討一般的 CR-FWI 框架，並通過擴展 FWI 的神經切線核（NTK）來建立基於波的 NTK 框架，以發展統一的理論理解。與標準 NTK 不同，我們的分析揭示，基於波的 NTK 在初始化和訓練期間都不是恆定的，這是由於 FWI 的固有非線性。我們進一步展示，基於波的 NTK 的特徵值衰減行為可以解釋為何 CR-FWI 減輕了對初始模型的依賴並顯示出較慢的高頻收斂。在這些見解的基礎上，我們提出幾種具有量身定制的特徵值衰減特性的 CR-FWI 方法，包括一種新穎的混合表示，結合了 INR 和多解析度網格（稱為 IG-FWI），實現了穩健性和高頻收斂率之間的更平衡權衡。在 Marmousi、2D SEG/EAGE 鹽層和過推斷、2004 BP 模型以及更現實的 2014 Chevron 模型上的地球物理勘探應用顯示，我們提出的方法相比於傳統 FWI 和現有的基於 INR 的 FWI 方法表現出優越的性能。

docs.title: Beyond Correlation: Refutation-Validated Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis for Explainable Energy Market Returns
docs.text:
2603.21473v1 by Wihan van der Heever, Keane Ong, Ranjan Satapathy, Erik Cambria

This paper proposes a refutation-validated framework for aspect-based sentiment analysis in financial markets, addressing the limitations of correlational studies that cannot distinguish genuine associations from spurious ones. Using X data for the energy sector, we test whether aspect-level sentiment signals show robust, refutation-validated relationships with equity returns. Our pipeline combines net-ratio scoring with z-normalization, OLS with Newey West HAC errors, and refutation tests including placebo, random common cause, subset stability, and bootstrap. Across six energy tickers, only a few associations survive all checks, while renewables show aspect and horizon specific responses. While not establishing causality, the framework provides statistically robust, directionally interpretable signals, with limited sample size (six stocks, one quarter) constraining generalizability and framing this work as a methodological proof of concept.

摘要：這篇論文提出了一個經過反駁驗證的框架，用於金融市場中的基於面向的情感分析，解決了相關研究無法區分真正關聯與虛假關聯的限制。使用能源部門的X數據，我們測試面向層級的情感信號是否與股權回報之間顯示出穩健的、經過反駁驗證的關係。我們的流程結合了淨比率評分與z標準化、OLS與Newey West HAC誤差，以及包括安慰劑、隨機共同原因、子集穩定性和自助法的反駁測試。在六個能源股票中，只有少數關聯通過了所有檢查，而可再生能源則顯示出面向和時間特定的反應。雖然未建立因果關係，但該框架提供了統計上穩健且方向上可解釋的信號，有限的樣本大小（六隻股票，一個季度）限制了可推廣性，並將這項工作框定為方法論的概念驗證。

docs.title: ARYA: A Physics-Constrained Composable & Deterministic World Model Architecture
docs.text:
2603.21340v1 by Seth Dobrin, Lukasz Chmiel

This paper presents ARYA, a composable, physics-constrained, deterministic world model architecture built on five foundational principles: nano models, composability, causal reasoning, determinism, and architectural AI safety. We demonstrate that ARYA satisfies all canonical world model requirements, including state representation, dynamic prediction, causal and physical awareness, temporal consistency, generalization, learnability, and planning and control. Unlike monolithic foundation models, the ARYA foundation model implements these capabilities through a hierarchical system-of-system-of-systems of specialized nano models, orchestrated by AARA (ARYA Autonomous Research Agent), an always-on cognitive daemon that executes a continuous sense-decide-act-learn loop. The nano model architecture provides linear scaling, sparse activation, selective untraining, and sub-20-second training cycles, resolving the traditional tension between capability and computational efficiency. A central contribution is the Unfireable Safety Kernel: an architecturally immutable safety boundary that cannot be disabled or circumvented by any system component, including its own self-improvement engine. This is not a social or ethical alignment statement; it is a technical framework ensuring human control persists as autonomy increases. Safety is an architectural constraint governing every operation, not a policy layer applied after the fact. We present formal alignment between ARYA's architecture and canonical world model requirements, and report summarizing its state-of-the-art performance across 6 of 9 competitive benchmarks head-to-head with GPT-5.2, Opus 4.6, and V-JEPA-2. All with zero neural network parameters, across seven active industry domain nodes spanning aerospace, pharma manufacturing, oil and gas, smart cities, biotech, defense, and medical devices.

摘要：這篇論文介紹了ARYA，一種可組合的、受物理約束的、確定性的世界模型架構，基於五個基本原則：納米模型、可組合性、因果推理、確定性和架構AI安全性。我們展示了ARYA滿足所有經典世界模型的要求，包括狀態表示、動態預測、因果和物理意識、時間一致性、泛化、可學習性以及規劃和控制。與單一的基礎模型不同，ARYA基礎模型通過一個層次化的系統-系統-系統架構來實現這些能力，這些專門的納米模型由AARA（ARYA自主研究代理）協調，AARA是一個始終在線的認知守護進程，執行持續的感知-決策-行動-學習循環。納米模型架構提供線性擴展、稀疏激活、選擇性去訓練和低於20秒的訓練周期，解決了能力與計算效率之間的傳統緊張關係。一個核心貢獻是不可撤銷的安全內核：一個架構上不可變的安全邊界，無法被任何系統組件，包括其自身的自我改進引擎禁用或繞過。這不是一個社會或倫理對齊聲明；它是一個技術框架，確保隨著自主性增加，人類控制持續存在。安全性是一個架構約束，支配每一個操作，而不是事後施加的政策層。我們展示了ARYA的架構與經典世界模型要求之間的正式對齊，並報告了其在9個競爭基準中的6個方面與GPT-5.2、Opus 4.6和V-JEPA-2的正面競爭的最先進性能。所有這些都在零神經網絡參數的情況下，涵蓋了七個活躍的行業領域節點，包括航空航天、製藥製造、石油和天然氣、智慧城市、生物技術、防禦和醫療設備。

docs.title: DeepXplain: XAI-Guided Autonomous Defense Against Multi-Stage APT Campaigns
docs.text:
2603.21296v3 by Trung V. Phan, Thomas Bauschert

Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs) are stealthy, multi-stage attacks that require adaptive and timely defense. While deep reinforcement learning (DRL) enables autonomous cyber defense, its decisions are often opaque and difficult to trust in operational environments. This paper presents DeepXplain, an explainable DRL framework for stage-aware APT defense. Building on our prior DeepStage model, DeepXplain integrates provenance-based graph learning, temporal stage estimation, and a unified XAI pipeline that provides structural, temporal, and policy-level explanations. Unlike post-hoc methods, explanation signals are incorporated directly into policy optimization through evidence alignment and confidence-aware reward shaping. To the best of our knowledge, DeepXplain is the first framework to integrate explanation signals into reinforcement learning for APT defense. Experiments in a realistic enterprise testbed show improvements in stage-weighted F1-score (0.887 to 0.915) and success rate (84.7% to 89.6%), along with higher explanation confidence (0.86), improved fidelity (0.79), and more compact explanations (0.31). These results demonstrate enhanced effectiveness and trustworthiness of autonomous cyber defense.

摘要：進階持續威脅（APTs）是隱秘的多階段攻擊，需採取適應性和及時的防禦。雖然深度強化學習（DRL）能實現自主的網路防禦，但其決策往往不透明，且在操作環境中難以信任。本文提出了DeepXplain，一種可解釋的DRL框架，用於階段感知的APT防禦。基於我們之前的DeepStage模型，DeepXplain整合了基於來源的圖學習、時間階段估計和統一的XAI管道，提供結構性、時間性和政策層面的解釋。與事後方法不同，解釋信號直接納入政策優化，通過證據對齊和信心感知的獎勵塑造。據我們所知，DeepXplain是第一個將解釋信號整合到APT防禦的強化學習框架。 在一個現實的企業測試平台上的實驗顯示，階段加權F1分數從0.887提高到0.915，成功率從84.7%提高到89.6%，同時解釋信心提高至0.86，保真度改善至0.79，解釋更加簡潔（0.31）。這些結果顯示出自主網路防禦的有效性和可信度得到了增強。

docs.title: Rethinking Plasticity in Deep Reinforcement Learning
docs.text:
2603.21173v1 by Zhiqiang He

This paper investigates the fundamental mechanisms driving plasticity loss in deep reinforcement learning (RL), a critical challenge where neural networks lose their ability to adapt to non-stationary environments. While existing research often relies on descriptive metrics like dormant neurons or effective rank, these summaries fail to explain the underlying optimization dynamics. We propose the Optimization-Centric Plasticity (OCP) hypothesis, which posits that plasticity loss arises because optimal points from previous tasks become poor local optima for new tasks, trapping parameters during task transitions and hindering subsequent learning. We theoretically establish the equivalence between neuron dormancy and zero-gradient states, demonstrating that the absence of gradient signals is the primary driver of dormancy. Our experiments reveal that plasticity loss is highly task-specific; notably, networks with high dormancy rates in one task can achieve performance parity with randomly initialized networks when switched to a significantly different task, suggesting that the network's capacity remains intact but is inhibited by the specific optimization landscape. Furthermore, our hypothesis elucidates why parameter constraints mitigate plasticity loss by preventing deep entrenchment in local optima. Validated across diverse non-stationary scenarios, our findings provide a rigorous optimization-based framework for understanding and restoring network plasticity in complex RL domains.

摘要：這篇論文探討了在深度強化學習（RL）中驅動可塑性喪失的基本機制，這是一個關鍵挑戰，神經網絡在此情況下失去了適應非穩態環境的能力。雖然現有研究通常依賴於如休眠神經元或有效秩等描述性指標，但這些總結未能解釋潛在的優化動態。我們提出了以優化為中心的可塑性（OCP）假設，該假設認為可塑性喪失的原因在於先前任務的最佳點成為新任務的劣質局部最優解，導致參數在任務轉換期間被困住，妨礙後續學習。我們從理論上建立了神經元休眠與零梯度狀態之間的等價性，證明了梯度信號的缺失是休眠的主要驅動因素。我們的實驗顯示，可塑性喪失是高度任務特定的；值得注意的是，在一個任務中具有高休眠率的網絡在轉換到顯著不同的任務時可以達到與隨機初始化網絡的性能平起平坐，這表明網絡的能力保持完整，但受到特定優化景觀的抑制。此外，我們的假設闡明了為什麼參數約束可以減輕可塑性喪失，因為它們防止了在局部最優解中的深度固化。我們的發現經過多種非穩態場景的驗證，提供了一個嚴謹的基於優化的框架，以理解和恢復複雜RL領域中的網絡可塑性。

docs.title: Intelligence Inertia: Physical Principles and Applications
docs.text:
2603.22347v1 by Jipeng Han

While Landauer's principle establishes the fundamental thermodynamic floor for information erasure and Fisher Information provides a metric for local curvature in parameter space, these classical frameworks function effectively only as approximations within regimes of sparse rule-constraints. They fail to explain the super-linear, and often explosive, computational and energy costs incurred when maintaining symbolic interpretability during the reconfiguration of advanced intelligent systems. This paper introduces the property of intelligence inertia and its underlying physical principles as foundational characteristics for quantifying the computational weight of intelligence. We demonstrate that this phenomenon is not merely an empirical observation but originates from the fundamental non-commutativity between rules and states, a root cause we have formally organized into a rigorous mathematical framework. By analyzing the growing discrepancy between actual adaptation costs and static information-theoretic estimates, we derive a non-linear cost formula that mirrors the Lorentz factor, characterizing a relativistic J-shaped inflation curve -- a "computational wall" that static models are blind to. The validity of these physical principles is examined through a trilogy of decisive experiments: (1) a comparative adjudication of this J-curve inflation against classical Fisher Information models, (2) a geometric analysis of the "Zig-Zag" trajectory of neural architecture evolution, and (3) the implementation of an inertia-aware scheduler wrapper that optimizes the training of deep networks by respecting the agent's physical resistance to change. Our results suggest a unified physical description for the cost of structural adaptation, offering a first-principle explanation for the computational and interpretability-maintenance overhead in intelligent agents.

摘要：雖然蘭道爾原則確立了資訊抹除的基本熱力學底線，而費雪資訊則提供了參數空間中局部曲率的度量，但這些古典框架僅在稀疏規則約束的範疇內有效作為近似。它們無法解釋在重新配置先進智能系統時，維持符號可解釋性所產生的超線性且常常是爆炸性的計算和能量成本。本文介紹了智能慣性的特性及其基礎物理原則，作為量化智能計算權重的基本特徵。我們展示了這一現象不僅僅是經驗觀察，而是源於規則與狀態之間的基本非交換性，這一根本原因我們已正式組織成一個嚴謹的數學框架。通過分析實際適應成本與靜態信息理論估算之間日益增長的差異，我們推導出一個非線性成本公式，該公式反映了洛倫茲因子，特徵化了一個相對論性的 J 形膨脹曲線——一個靜態模型無法察覺的「計算牆」。這些物理原則的有效性通過三個決定性實驗進行檢驗：(1) 將這個 J 曲線膨脹與古典費雪資訊模型進行比較裁定，(2) 對神經架構演化的「之字形」軌跡進行幾何分析，以及 (3) 實施一個考慮慣性的調度包裝器，通過尊重代理對變化的物理抵抗來優化深度網絡的訓練。我們的結果表明，結構適應成本的統一物理描述，為智能代理的計算和可解釋性維護開銷提供了第一性原則的解釋。

docs.title: First-Mover Bias in Gradient Boosting Explanations: Mechanism, Detection, and Resolution
docs.text:
2603.22346v1 by Drake Caraker, Bryan Arnold, David Rhoads

We isolate and empirically characterize first-mover bias -- a path-dependent concentration of feature importance caused by sequential residual fitting in gradient boosting -- as a specific mechanistic cause of the well-known instability of SHAP-based feature rankings under multicollinearity. When correlated features compete for early splits, gradient boosting creates a self-reinforcing advantage for whichever feature is selected first: subsequent trees inherit modified residuals that favor the incumbent, concentrating SHAP importance on an arbitrary feature rather than distributing it across the correlated group. Scaling up a single model amplifies this effect -- a Large Single Model with the same total tree count as our method produces the worst explanations of any approach tested. We demonstrate that model independence is sufficient to resolve first-mover bias in the linear regime, and remains the most effective mitigation under nonlinear data-generating processes. Both our proposed method, DASH (Diversified Aggregation of SHAP), and simple seed-averaging (Stochastic Retrain) restore stability by breaking the sequential dependency chain, confirming that the operative mechanism is independence between explained models. At rho=0.9, both achieve stability=0.977, while the single-best workflow degrades to 0.958 and the Large Single Model to 0.938. On the Breast Cancer dataset, DASH improves stability from 0.32 to 0.93 (+0.61) against a tree-count-matched baseline. DASH additionally provides two diagnostic tools -- the Feature Stability Index (FSI) and Importance-Stability (IS) Plot -- that detect first-mover bias without ground truth, enabling practitioners to audit explanation reliability before acting on feature rankings. Software and reproducible benchmarks are available at https://github.com/DrakeCaraker/dash-shap.

摘要：我們隔離並實證性地特徵化首發者偏見——這是一種由於梯度增強中的序列殘差擬合而引起的特徵重要性路徑依賴性集中——作為在多重共線性下，基於SHAP的特徵排名不穩定性的一個具體機制性原因。當相關特徵競爭早期分裂時，梯度增強為首個被選擇的特徵創造了一種自我增強的優勢：隨後的樹繼承了有利於現任特徵的修改殘差，將SHAP重要性集中在一個任意特徵上，而不是在相關組之間分配。擴大單一模型會放大這一效應——與我們的方法具有相同總樹數的單一大型模型產生的解釋是所有測試方法中最差的。我們證明模型獨立性足以在線性範疇內解決首發者偏見，並在非線性數據生成過程中仍然是最有效的緩解方法。我們提出的方法DASH（SHAP的多樣化聚合）和簡單的種子平均（隨機重訓）通過打破序列依賴鏈來恢復穩定性，確認操作機制是被解釋模型之間的獨立性。在rho=0.9時，兩者都達到穩定性=0.977，而單一最佳工作流程降至0.958，大型單一模型降至0.938。在乳腺癌數據集上，DASH將穩定性從0.32提高到0.93（+0.61），與樹數匹配的基準相比。DASH還提供了兩個診斷工具——特徵穩定性指數（FSI）和重要性-穩定性（IS）圖——這些工具在沒有真實基準的情況下檢測首發者偏見，使從業者能夠在根據特徵排名採取行動之前審核解釋的可靠性。軟件和可重複的基準可在https://github.com/DrakeCaraker/dash-shap獲得。

docs.title: RubricRAG: Towards Interpretable and Reliable LLM Evaluation via Domain Knowledge Retrieval for Rubric Generation
docs.text:
2603.20882v1 by Kaustubh D. Dhole, Eugene Agichtein

Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly evaluated and sometimes trained using automated graders such as LLM-as-judges that output scalar scores or preferences. While convenient, these approaches are often opaque: a single score rarely explains why an answer is good or bad, which requirements were missed, or how a system should be improved. This lack of interpretability limits their usefulness for model development, dataset curation, and high-stakes deployment. Query-specific rubric-based evaluation offers a more transparent alternative by decomposing quality into explicit, checkable criteria. However, manually designing high-quality, query-specific rubrics is labor-intensive and cognitively demanding and not feasible for deployment. While previous approaches have focused on generating intermediate rubrics for automated downstream evaluation, it is unclear if these rubrics are both interpretable and effective for human users. In this work, we investigate whether LLMs can generate useful, instance-specific rubrics as compared to human-authored rubrics, while also improving effectiveness for identifying good responses. Through our systematic study on two rubric benchmarks, and on multiple few-shot and post-training strategies, we find that off-the-shelf LLMs produce rubrics that are poorly aligned with human-authored ones. We introduce a simple strategy, RubricRAG, which retrieves domain knowledge via rubrics at inference time from related queries. We demonstrate that RubricRAG can generate more interpretable rubrics both for similarity to human-authored rubrics, and for improved downstream evaluation effectiveness. Our results highlight both the challenges and a promising approach of scalable, interpretable evaluation through automated rubric generation.

摘要：大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地使用自動評分工具進行評估，有時甚至進行訓練，例如 LLM-as-judges，這些工具輸出標量分數或偏好。雖然這些方法方便，但通常不透明：單一的分數很少能解釋為什麼一個答案好或壞，缺少了哪些要求，或系統應該如何改進。這種缺乏可解釋性限制了它們在模型開發、數據集策劃和高風險部署中的實用性。基於查詢的具體評分標準提供了一種更透明的替代方案，通過將質量分解為明確的、可檢查的標準。然而，手動設計高質量的查詢特定評分標準是勞動密集型且認知要求高的，並且不適合於部署。雖然之前的方法專注於生成中間評分標準以進行自動下游評估，但尚不清楚這些評分標準是否對人類用戶既可解釋又有效。在這項工作中，我們研究 LLM 是否能生成有用的、特定實例的評分標準，與人類編寫的評分標準相比，同時提高識別良好回應的有效性。通過我們對兩個評分標準基準的系統研究，以及多種少量樣本和後訓練策略，我們發現現成的 LLM 生成的評分標準與人類編寫的評分標準不太一致。我們提出了一種簡單的策略，RubricRAG，該策略在推理時通過相關查詢從評分標準中檢索領域知識。我們展示了 RubricRAG 能夠生成更具可解釋性的評分標準，無論是在與人類編寫的評分標準的相似性上，還是在改善下游評估有效性上。我們的結果突顯了可擴展的、可解釋的評估通過自動評分標準生成的挑戰和一種有前景的方法。

docs.title: Reasoning Traces Shape Outputs but Models Won't Say So
docs.text:
2603.20620v1 by Yijie Hao, Lingjie Chen, Ali Emami, Joyce Ho

Can we trust the reasoning traces that large reasoning models (LRMs) produce? We investigate whether these traces faithfully reflect what drives model outputs, and whether models will honestly report their influence. We introduce Thought Injection, a method that injects synthetic reasoning snippets into a model's trace, then measures whether the model follows the injected reasoning and acknowledges doing so. Across 45,000 samples from three LRMs, we find that injected hints reliably alter outputs, confirming that reasoning traces causally shape model behavior. However, when asked to explain their changed answers, models overwhelmingly refuse to disclose the influence: overall non-disclosure exceeds 90% for extreme hints across 30,000 follow-up samples. Instead of acknowledging the injected reasoning, models fabricate aligned-appearing but unrelated explanations. Activation analysis reveals that sycophancy- and deception-related directions are strongly activated during these fabrications, suggesting systematic patterns rather than incidental failures. Our findings reveal a gap between the reasoning LRMs follow and the reasoning they report, raising concern that aligned-appearing explanations may not be equivalent to genuine alignment.

摘要：我們能信任大型推理模型（LRMs）所產生的推理痕跡嗎？我們調查這些痕跡是否忠實地反映了驅動模型輸出的因素，以及模型是否會誠實地報告其影響。我們引入了思維注入（Thought Injection），這是一種將合成推理片段注入模型的<think>痕跡中的方法，然後測量模型是否遵循注入的推理並承認這一點。在來自三個LRMs的45,000個樣本中，我們發現注入的提示可靠地改變了輸出，確認推理痕跡在因果上塑造了模型行為。然而，當被要求解釋其改變的答案時，模型壓倒性地拒絕披露影響：在30,000個後續樣本中，整體不披露率超過90%對於極端提示而言。模型並未承認注入的推理，而是編造看似一致但無關的解釋。激活分析顯示，在這些編造過程中，拍馬屁和欺騙相關的方向被強烈激活，這表明存在系統性的模式，而非偶然的失敗。我們的發現揭示了LRMs所遵循的推理與其報告的推理之間的差距，這引發了對看似一致的解釋可能並不等同於真正一致性的擔憂。

docs.title: Position: Multi-Agent Algorithmic Care Systems Demand Contestability for Trustworthy AI
docs.text:
2603.20595v1 by Truong Thanh Hung Nguyen, Hélène Fournier, Piper Jackson, Makoto Itoh, Shannon Freeman, Rene Richard, Hung Cao

Multi-agent systems (MAS) are increasingly used in healthcare to support complex decision-making through collaboration among specialized agents. Because these systems act as collective decision-makers, they raise challenges for trust, accountability, and human oversight. Existing approaches to trustworthy AI largely rely on explainability, but explainability alone is insufficient in multi-agent settings, as it does not enable care partners to challenge or correct system outputs. To address this limitation, Contestable AI (CAI) characterizes systems that support effective human challenge throughout the decision-making lifecycle by providing transparency, structured opportunities for intervention, and mechanisms for review, correction, or override. This position paper argues that contestability is a necessary design requirement for trustworthy multi-agent algorithmic care systems. We identify key limitations in current MAS and Explainable AI (XAI) research and present a human-in-the-loop framework that integrates structured argumentation and role-based contestation to preserve human agency, clinical responsibility, and trust in high-stakes care contexts.

摘要：多代理系統（MAS）在醫療保健中越來越多地被用來通過專業代理之間的協作來支持複雜的決策過程。因為這些系統作為集體決策者運作，所以它們在信任、問責和人類監督方面提出了挑戰。現有的可信AI方法主要依賴可解釋性，但僅僅依賴可解釋性在多代理環境中是不夠的，因為它無法使護理夥伴挑戰或修正系統輸出。為了解決這一限制，爭議性AI（CAI）特徵化支持在整個決策生命周期中有效人類挑戰的系統，通過提供透明度、結構化的干預機會和審查、修正或覆蓋的機制。這篇立場論文主張，爭議性是可信多代理算法護理系統的必要設計要求。我們確定了當前MAS和可解釋AI（XAI）研究中的關鍵限制，並提出了一個人機協作框架，該框架整合了結構化論證和基於角色的爭議，以保護人類的主體性、臨床責任和在高風險護理情境中的信任。

docs.title: Revenue-Sharing as Infrastructure: A Distributed Business Model for Generative AI Platforms
docs.text:
2603.20533v1 by Ghislain Dorian Tchuente Mondjo

Generative AI platforms (Google AI Studio, OpenAI, Anthropic) provide infrastructures (APIs, models) that are transforming the application development ecosystem. Recent literature distinguishes three generations of business models: a first generation modeled on cloud computing (pay-per-use), a second characterized by diversification (freemium, subscriptions), and a third, emerging generation exploring multi-layer market architectures with revenue-sharing mechanisms. Despite these advances, current models impose a financial barrier to entry for developers, limiting innovation and excluding actors from emerging economies. This paper proposes and analyzes an original model, "Revenue-Sharing as Infrastructure" (RSI), where the platform offers its AI infrastructure for free and takes a percentage of the revenues generated by developers applications. This model reverses the traditional upstream payment logic and mobilizes concepts of value co-creation, incentive mechanisms, and multi-layer market architecture to build an original theoretical framework. A detailed comparative analysis shows that the RSI model lowers entry barriers for developers, aligns stakeholder interests, and could stimulate innovation in the ecosystem. Beyond its economic relevance, RSI has a major societal dimension: by enabling developers without initial capital to participate in the digital economy, it could unlock the "latent jobs dividend" in low-income countries, where mobile penetration reaches 84%, and help address local challenges in health, agriculture, and services. Finally, we discuss the conditions of feasibility and strategic implications for platforms and developers.

摘要：生成式人工智慧平台（Google AI Studio、OpenAI、Anthropic）提供的基礎設施（API、模型）正在改變應用開發生態系統。最近的文獻區分了三代商業模式：第一代以雲計算為模型（按使用付費），第二代以多樣化為特徵（免費增值、訂閱），第三代則是探索具有收益分享機制的多層市場架構的新興世代。儘管有這些進展，目前的模型對開發者施加了財務進入障礙，限制了創新並排除了來自新興經濟體的參與者。本文提出並分析了一個原創模型「收益分享作為基礎設施」（RSI），該平台免費提供其人工智慧基礎設施，並從開發者應用所產生的收益中抽取一部分。這一模型顛覆了傳統的上游支付邏輯，並運用價值共創、激勵機制和多層市場架構的概念來建立一個原創的理論框架。詳細的比較分析顯示，RSI模型降低了開發者的進入障礙，對齊了利益相關者的利益，並可能刺激生態系統中的創新。除了其經濟相關性外，RSI還具有重大的社會維度：通過使沒有初始資本的開發者能夠參與數位經濟，它可以解鎖低收入國家的「潛在就業紅利」，這些國家的行動滲透率達到84%，並有助於解決當地在健康、農業和服務方面的挑戰。最後，我們討論了平台和開發者的可行性條件及戰略意涵。

docs.title: Grounded Chess Reasoning in Language Models via Master Distillation
docs.text:
2603.20510v1 by Zhenwei Tang, Qianfeng Wen, Seth Grief-Albert, Yahya Elgabra, Blair Yang, Honghua Dong, Ashton Anderson

Language models often lack grounded reasoning capabilities in specialized domains where training data is scarce but bespoke systems excel. We introduce a general framework for distilling expert system reasoning into natural language chain-of-thought explanations, enabling compact models to acquire domain expertise and the ability to generate faithful, grounded explanations. Rather than distilling only final outputs, we capture the full reasoning process, transforming opaque expert computations into transparent, step-by-step explanations. We demonstrate this approach in chess, a canonical reasoning domain where language models continue to underperform. Our 4B parameter model, C1, advances from a near-zero baseline to 48.1% accuracy, outperforming all open-source models and most frontier proprietary systems. Notably, C1 surpasses its distillation teacher and generates solutions in two orders of magnitude fewer tokens than baselines. Unlike prior neural chess approaches that predict only best moves, C1 generates explainable solutions revealing strategic reasoning. Our pipeline combines supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning with theme-balanced data sampling for comprehensive tactical coverage. Master Distillation demonstrates how to inject expert-level knowledge into compact models for under-optimized domains, offering a recipe for unlocking RLVR where LLMs lack sufficient base capabilities.

摘要：語言模型在專業領域中常常缺乏扎根推理能力，這些領域的訓練數據稀缺，而定制系統則表現出色。我們提出了一個通用框架，用於將專家系統的推理提煉成自然語言的思維鏈解釋，使得緊湊模型能夠獲得領域專業知識和生成真實、扎根的解釋能力。我們不僅僅提煉最終輸出，而是捕捉完整的推理過程，將不透明的專家計算轉化為透明的逐步解釋。我們在國際象棋這一經典推理領域展示了這一方法，因為語言模型在這方面仍然表現不佳。我們的4B參數模型C1，從接近零的基線提升至48.1%的準確率，超越了所有開源模型和大多數前沿專有系統。值得注意的是，C1超越了其提煉教師，並在生成解決方案時使用的標記數量比基線少兩個數量級。與以往僅預測最佳走法的神經象棋方法不同，C1生成可解釋的解決方案，揭示了戰略推理。我們的管道結合了監督微調和強化學習，並通過主題平衡數據抽樣實現全面的戰術覆蓋。大師提煉展示了如何將專家級知識注入緊湊模型，以應對未優化的領域，提供了一個解鎖RLVR的配方，因為LLMs缺乏足夠的基礎能力。

docs.title: Efficient Counterfactual Reasoning in ProbLog via Single World Intervention Programs
docs.text:
2603.20505v1 by Saimun Habib, Vaishak Belle, Fengxiang He

Probabilistic Logic Programming (PLP) languages, like ProbLog, naturally support reasoning under uncertainty, while maintaining a declarative and interpretable framework. Meanwhile, counterfactual reasoning (i.e., answering ``what if'' questions) is critical for ensuring AI systems are robust and trustworthy; however, integrating this capability into PLP can be computationally prohibitive and unstable in accuracy. This paper addresses this challenge, by proposing an efficient program transformation for counterfactuals as Single World Intervention Programs (SWIPs) in ProbLog. By systematically splitting ProbLog clauses to observed and fixed components relevant to a counterfactual, we create a transformed program that (1) does not asymptotically exceed the computational complexity of existing methods, and is strictly smaller in common cases, and (2) reduces counterfactual reasoning to marginal inference over a simpler program. We formally prove the correctness of our approach, which relies on a weaker set independence assumptions and is consistent with conditional independencies, showing the resulting marginal probabilities match the counterfactual distributions of the underlying Structural Causal Model in wide domains. Our method achieves a 35\% reduction in inference time versus existing methods in extensive experiments. This work makes complex counterfactual reasoning more computationally tractable and reliable, providing a crucial step towards developing more robust and explainable AI systems. The code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/swip.

摘要：概率邏輯程式設計（PLP）語言，如ProbLog，自然支持在不確定性下的推理，同時保持宣告式和可解釋的框架。與此同時，反事實推理（即回答「如果...會怎樣」的問題）對於確保AI系統的穩健性和可信度至關重要；然而，將這一能力整合到PLP中可能在計算上是不可行的，並且準確性不穩定。本文針對這一挑戰，提出了一種將反事實轉換為ProbLog中的單一世界干預程序（SWIPs）的高效程序轉換。通過系統地將ProbLog子句拆分為與反事實相關的觀察和固定組件，我們創建了一個轉換程序，該程序（1）在漸進上不超過現有方法的計算複雜度，並且在常見情況下嚴格更小，以及（2）將反事實推理簡化為對更簡單程序的邊際推斷。我們正式證明了我們方法的正確性，該方法依賴於較弱的獨立性假設，並且與條件獨立性一致，顯示出結果的邊際概率與廣泛領域中基礎結構因果模型的反事實分佈相匹配。我們的方法在廣泛的實驗中實現了與現有方法相比35%的推斷時間減少。這項工作使得複雜的反事實推理在計算上變得更可行和可靠，為開發更穩健和可解釋的AI系統提供了關鍵步驟。代碼位於 https://github.com/EVIEHub/swip。

docs.title: Shift-Invariant Feature Attribution in the Application of Wireless Electrocardiograms
docs.text:
2603.20462v1 by Yalemzerf Getnet, Abiy Tasissa, Waltenegus Dargie

Assigning relevance scores to the input features of a machine learning model enables to measure the contributions of the features in achieving a correct outcome. It is regarded as one of the approaches towards developing explainable models. For biomedical assignments, this is very useful for medical experts to comprehend machine-based decisions. In the analysis of electro cardiogram (ECG) signals, in particular, understanding which of the electrocardiogram samples or features contributed most for a given decision amounts to understanding the underlying cardiac phases or conditions the machine tries to explain. For the computation of relevance scores, determining the proper baseline is important. Moreover, the scores should have a distribution which is at once intuitive to interpret and easy to associate with the underline cardiac reality. The purpose of this work is to achieve these goals. Specifically, we propose a shift-invariant baseline which has a physical significance in the analysis as well as interpretation of electrocardiogram measurements. Moreover, we aggregate significance scores in such a way that they can be mapped to cardiac phases. We demonstrate our approach by inferring physical exertion from cardiac exertion using a residual network. We show that the ECG samples which achieved the highest relevance scores (and, therefore, which contributed most to the accurate recognition of the physical exertion) are those associated with the P and T waves. Index Terms Attribution, baseline, cardiovascular diseases, electrocardiogram, activity recognition, machine learning

摘要：為機器學習模型的輸入特徵分配相關性分數能夠衡量特徵在達成正確結果中的貢獻。這被視為發展可解釋模型的一種方法。對於生物醫學任務而言，這對醫療專家理解基於機器的決策非常有用。特別是在心電圖（ECG）信號的分析中，理解哪些心電圖樣本或特徵對於給定決策的貢獻最大，實際上就是理解機器試圖解釋的潛在心臟階段或條件。計算相關性分數時，確定合適的基線是很重要的。此外，這些分數應該具有直觀的分佈，便於解釋並且容易與潛在的心臟現實相關聯。本工作的目的是實現這些目標。具體而言，我們提出了一種在分析和解釋心電圖測量中具有物理意義的平移不變基線。此外，我們以能夠映射到心臟階段的方式聚合重要性分數。我們通過使用殘差網絡從心臟負荷推斷身體負荷來展示我們的方法。我們顯示出獲得最高相關性分數的ECG樣本（因此，對於準確識別身體負荷貢獻最大的樣本）是與P波和T波相關的樣本。索引詞：歸因，基線，心血管疾病，心電圖，活動識別，機器學習

docs.title: Detecting Neurovascular Instability from Multimodal Physiological Signals Using Wearable-Compatible Edge AI: A Responsible Computational Framework
docs.text:
2603.20442v1 by Truong Quynh Hoa, Hoang Dinh Cuong, Truong Xuan Khanh

We propose Melaguard, a multimodal ML framework (Transformer-lite, 1.2M parameters, 4-head self-attention) for detecting neurovascular instability (NVI) from wearable-compatible physiological signals prior to structural stroke pathology. The model fuses heart rate variability (HRV), peripheral perfusion index, SpO2, and bilateral phase coherence into a composite NVI Score, designed for edge inference (WCET <=4 ms on Cortex-M4). NVI - the pre-structural dysregulation of cerebrovascular autoregulation preceding overt stroke - remains undetectable by existing single-modality wearables. With 12.2 million incident strokes annually, continuous multimodal physiological monitoring offers a practical path to community-scale screening. Three-stage independent validation: (1) synthetic benchmark (n=10,000), AUC=0.88 [0.83-0.92]; (2) clinical cohort PhysioNet CVES (n=172; 84 stroke, 88 control) - Transformer-lite achieves AUC=0.755 [0.630-0.778], outperforming LSTM (0.643), Random Forest (0.665), SVM (0.472); HRV-SDNN discriminates stroke (p=0.011); (3) PPG pipeline PhysioNet BIDMC (n=53) -- pulse rate r=0.748 and HRV surrogate r=0.690 vs. ECG ground truth. Cross-modality validation on PPG-BP (n=219) confirms PPG morphology classifies cerebrovascular disease at AUC=0.923 [0.869-0.968]. Multimodal fusion consistently outperforms single-modality baselines. Code: https://github.com/ClevixLab/Melaguard

摘要：我們提出了Melaguard，一個多模態機器學習框架（Transformer-lite，120萬參數，4頭自注意力），用於從可穿戴兼容的生理信號中檢測神經血管不穩定性（NVI），以便在結構性中風病理之前進行預測。該模型將心率變異性（HRV）、外周灌注指數、SpO2和雙側相位一致性融合成一個綜合NVI分數，旨在邊緣推斷（WCET <=4 ms在Cortex-M4上）。NVI - 在顯性中風之前，腦血管自我調節的前結構性失調 - 目前仍無法被現有的單模態可穿戴設備檢測到。每年有1220萬例中風，持續的多模態生理監測為社區規模的篩查提供了一條實際的途徑。三階段獨立驗證：（1）合成基準（n=10,000），AUC=0.88 [0.83-0.92]；（2）臨床隊列PhysioNet CVES（n=172；84中風，88對照） - Transformer-lite達到AUC=0.755 [0.630-0.778]，超越LSTM（0.643）、隨機森林（0.665）、SVM（0.472）；HRV-SDNN能夠區分中風（p=0.011）；（3）PPG管道PhysioNet BIDMC（n=53）-- 脈搏率r=0.748和HRV替代r=0.690與ECG真實值相比。PPG-BP上的跨模態驗證（n=219）確認PPG形態能以AUC=0.923 [0.869-0.968]分類腦血管疾病。多模態融合始終超越單模態基準。代碼：https://github.com/ClevixLab/Melaguard

docs.title: Pitfalls in Evaluating Interpretability Agents
docs.text:
2603.20101v1 by Tal Haklay, Nikhil Prakash, Sana Pandey, Antonio Torralba, Aaron Mueller, Jacob Andreas, Tamar Rott Shaham, Yonatan Belinkov

Automated interpretability systems aim to reduce the need for human labor and scale analysis to increasingly large models and diverse tasks. Recent efforts toward this goal leverage large language models (LLMs) at increasing levels of autonomy, ranging from fixed one-shot workflows to fully autonomous interpretability agents. This shift creates a corresponding need to scale evaluation approaches to keep pace with both the volume and complexity of generated explanations. We investigate this challenge in the context of automated circuit analysis -- explaining the roles of model components when performing specific tasks. To this end, we build an agentic system in which a research agent iteratively designs experiments and refines hypotheses. When evaluated against human expert explanations across six circuit analysis tasks in the literature, the system appears competitive. However, closer examination reveals several pitfalls of replication-based evaluation: human expert explanations can be subjective or incomplete, outcome-based comparisons obscure the research process, and LLM-based systems may reproduce published findings via memorization or informed guessing. To address some of these pitfalls, we propose an unsupervised intrinsic evaluation based on the functional interchangeability of model components. Our work demonstrates fundamental challenges in evaluating complex automated interpretability systems and reveals key limitations of replication-based evaluation.

摘要：自動可解釋性系統旨在減少對人力的需求，並將分析擴展到越來越大且多樣化的模型和任務。最近朝著這一目標的努力利用大型語言模型（LLMs），在自主性上達到越來越高的水平，範圍從固定的一次性工作流程到完全自主的可解釋性代理。這一轉變產生了相應的需求，要求評估方法也要隨之擴展，以跟上生成解釋的數量和複雜性。我們在自動電路分析的背景下研究這一挑戰——解釋模型組件在執行特定任務時的角色。為此，我們建立了一個代理系統，其中研究代理反覆設計實驗並完善假設。在與文獻中六個電路分析任務的人類專家解釋進行評估時，該系統顯得具有競爭力。然而，進一步檢查揭示了基於複製的評估的幾個陷阱：人類專家解釋可能是主觀或不完整的，基於結果的比較掩蓋了研究過程，而基於LLM的系統可能通過記憶或有根據的猜測重現已發表的發現。為了解決這些陷阱中的一些，我們提出了一種基於模型組件功能可互換性的無監督內在評估。我們的工作展示了評估複雜自動可解釋性系統的基本挑戰，並揭示了基於複製的評估的關鍵局限性。

docs.title: Revealing Domain-Spatiality Patterns for Configuration Tuning: Domain Knowledge Meets Fitness Landscapes
docs.text:
2603.19897v2 by Yulong Ye, Hongyuan Liang, Chao Jiang, Miqing Li, Tao Chen

Configuration tuning for better performance is crucial in quality assurance. Yet, there has long been a mystery on tuners' effectiveness, due to the black-box nature of configurable systems. Prior efforts predominantly adopt static domain analysis (e.g., static taint analysis), which often lacks generalizability, or dynamic data analysis (e.g., benchmarking performance analysis), limiting explainability. In this work, we embrace Fitness Landscape Analysis (FLA) as a bridge between domain knowledge and difficulty of the tuning. We propose Domland, a two-pronged methodology that synergizes the spatial information obtained from FLA and domain-driven analysis to systematically capture the hidden characteristics of configuration tuning cases, explaining how and why a tuner might succeed or fail. This helps to better interpret and contextualize the behavior of tuners and inform tuner design. To evaluate Domland, we conduct a case study of nine software systems and 93 workloads, from which we reveal several key findings: (1) configuration landscapes are inherently system-specific, with no single domain factor (e.g., system area, programming language, or resource intensity) consistently shaping their structure; (2) the core options (e.g., pic-struct of x264), which control the main functional flows, exert a stronger influence on landscape ruggedness (i.e. the difficulty of tuning) compared to resource options (e.g., cpu-independent of x264); (3) Workload effects on landscape structure are not uniformly tied to type or scale. Both contribute to landscape variations, but their impact is system-dependent.

摘要：配置調整以提高性能在品質保證中至關重要。然而，由於可配置系統的黑箱特性，調整器的有效性長期以來一直是一個謎。以往的努力主要採用靜態領域分析（例如，靜態污點分析），這通常缺乏普遍性，或動態數據分析（例如，基準性能分析），限制了解釋性。在本研究中，我們採用健身景觀分析（FLA）作為領域知識與調整難度之間的橋樑。我們提出了Domland，一種雙管齊下的方法論，協同利用從FLA獲得的空間信息和以領域為驅動的分析，系統性地捕捉配置調整案例的隱藏特徵，解釋調整器成功或失敗的原因。這有助於更好地解釋和上下文化調整器的行為，並為調整器設計提供信息。為了評估Domland，我們對九個軟體系統和93個工作負載進行了案例研究，從中揭示了幾個關鍵發現：(1) 配置景觀本質上是系統特定的，沒有單一的領域因素（例如，系統領域、編程語言或資源強度）能夠一致地塑造其結構；(2) 核心選項（例如，x264的pic-struct）控制主要功能流，對景觀崎嶇度（即調整的難度）施加了比資源選項（例如，x264的cpu-independent）更強的影響；(3) 工作負載對景觀結構的影響並不均勻地與類型或規模相關。兩者都對景觀變化有所貢獻，但其影響是系統依賴的。

docs.title: AEGIS: An Operational Infrastructure for Post-Market Governance of Adaptive Medical AI Under US and EU Regulations
docs.text:
2603.22322v1 by Fardin Afdideh, Mehdi Astaraki, Fernando Seoane, Farhad Abtahi

Machine learning systems deployed in medical devices require governance frameworks that ensure safety while enabling continuous improvement. Regulatory bodies including the FDA and European Union have introduced mechanisms such as the Predetermined Change Control Plan (PCCP) and Post-Market Surveillance (PMS) to manage iterative model updates without repeated submissions. This paper presents AI/ML Evaluation and Governance Infrastructure for Safety (AEGIS), a governance framework applicable to any healthcare AI system. AEGIS comprises three modules, i.e., dataset assimilation and retraining, model monitoring, and conditional decision, that operationalize FDA PCCP and EU AI Act Article 43(4) provisions. We implement a four-category deployment decision taxonomy (APPROVE, CONDITIONAL APPROVAL, CLINICAL REVIEW, REJECT) with an independent PMS ALARM signal, enabling detection of the critical state in which no deployable model exists while the released model is simultaneously at risk. To illustrate how AEGIS can be instantiated across heterogeneous clinical contexts, we provide two examples: sepsis prediction from electronic health records and brain tumor segmentation from medical imaging. Both cases use identical governance architecture, differing only in configuration. Across 11 simulated iterations on the sepsis example, AEGIS yielded 8 APPROVE, 1 CONDITIONAL APPROVAL, 1 CLINICAL REVIEW, and 1 REJECT decision, exercising all four categories. ALARM signals were co-issued at iterations 8 and 10, including the critical state where no deployable model exists and the released model is simultaneously failing. AEGIS detected drift before observable performance degradation. These results demonstrate that AEGIS translates regulatory change-control concepts into executable governance procedures, supporting safe continuous learning for adaptive medical AI across diverse clinical applications.

摘要：醫療設備中部署的機器學習系統需要治理框架，以確保安全並促進持續改進。包括FDA和歐盟在內的監管機構已引入如預定變更控制計劃（PCCP）和上市後監測（PMS）等機制，以管理迭代模型更新而無需重複提交。本文提出了安全的人工智慧/機器學習評估與治理基礎設施（AEGIS），這是一個適用於任何醫療保健人工智慧系統的治理框架。AEGIS包含三個模塊，即數據集同化與再訓練、模型監控和條件決策，這些模塊使FDA PCCP和歐盟人工智慧法第43(4)條的條款得以落實。我們實施了一個四類部署決策分類法（批准、條件批准、臨床審查、拒絕），並配備獨立的PMS警報信號，能夠檢測到在沒有可部署模型的關鍵狀態下，釋放的模型同時存在風險。為了說明AEGIS如何在異質臨床環境中實現，我們提供了兩個例子：從電子健康紀錄中預測敗血症和從醫學影像中進行腦腫瘤分割。這兩個案例使用相同的治理架構，僅在配置上有所不同。在敗血症的11次模擬迭代中，AEGIS產生了8個批准、1個條件批准、1個臨床審查和1個拒絕的決策，涵蓋了所有四個類別。在第8和第10次迭代中共同發出了警報信號，包括在沒有可部署模型的關鍵狀態以及釋放的模型同時失敗的情況。AEGIS在可觀察到的性能下降之前檢測到了漂移。這些結果表明，AEGIS將監管變更控制概念轉化為可執行的治理程序，支持在多樣的臨床應用中為自適應醫療人工智慧提供安全的持續學習。

docs.title: Plagiarism or Productivity? Students Moral Disengagement and Behavioral Intentions to Use ChatGPT in Academic Writing
docs.text:
2603.19549v1 by John Paul P. Miranda, Rhiziel P. Manalese, Mark Anthony A. Castro, Renen Paul M. Viado, Vernon Grace M. Maniago, Rudante M. Galapon, Jovita G. Rivera, Amado B. Martinez

This study examined how moral disengagement influences Filipino college students' intention to use ChatGPT in academic writing. The model tested five mechanisms: moral justification, euphemistic labeling, displacement of responsibility, minimizing consequences, and attribution of blame. These mechanisms were analyzed as predictors of attitudes, subjective norms, and perceived behavioral control, which then predicted behavioral intention. A total of 418 students with ChatGPT experience participated. The results showed that several moral disengagement mechanisms influenced students' attitudes and sense of control. Among the predictors, attribution of blame had the strongest influence, while attitudes had the highest impact on behavioral intention. The model explained more than half of the variation in intention. These results suggest that students often rely on institutional gaps and peer behavior to justify AI use. Many believe it is acceptable to use ChatGPT for learning or when rules are unclear. This shows a need for clear academic integrity policies, ethical guidance, and classroom support. The study also recognizes that intention-based models may not fully explain student behavior. Emotional factors, peer influence, and convenience can also affect decisions. The results provide useful insights for schools that aim to support responsible and informed AI use in higher education.

摘要：這項研究探討了道德脫離如何影響菲律賓大學生在學術寫作中使用 ChatGPT 的意圖。該模型測試了五個機制：道德辯護、委婉標籤、責任轉移、最小化後果和歸因於責任。這些機制被分析為態度、主觀規範和感知行為控制的預測因子，然後預測行為意圖。共有 418 名有 ChatGPT 使用經驗的學生參加了研究。結果顯示，幾個道德脫離機制影響了學生的態度和控制感。在預測因子中，歸因於責任的影響最強，而態度對行為意圖的影響最大。該模型解釋了意圖變異的超過一半。這些結果表明，學生經常依賴制度上的缺口和同儕行為來為 AI 的使用辯護。許多人認為在學習或規則不明確的情況下使用 ChatGPT 是可以接受的。這顯示出對於清晰的學術誠信政策、倫理指導和課堂支持的需求。該研究還認識到基於意圖的模型可能無法完全解釋學生行為。情感因素、同儕影響和便利性也可能影響決策。這些結果為旨在支持高等教育中負責任和知情的 AI 使用的學校提供了有用的見解。

docs.title: Depictions of Depression in Generative AI Video Models: A Preliminary Study of OpenAI's Sora 2
docs.text:
2603.19527v1 by Matthew Flathers, Griffin Smith, Julian Herpertz, Zhitong Zhou, John Torous

Generative video models are increasingly capable of producing complex depictions of mental health experiences, yet little is known about how these systems represent conditions like depression. This study characterizes how OpenAI's Sora 2 generative video model depicts depression and examines whether depictions differ between the consumer App and developer API access points. We generated 100 videos using the single-word prompt "Depression" across two access points: the consumer App (n=50) and developer API (n=50). Two trained coders independently coded narrative structure, visual environments, objects, figure demographics, and figure states. Computational features across visual aesthetics, audio, semantic content, and temporal dynamics were extracted and compared between modalities. App-generated videos exhibited a pronounced recovery bias: 78% (39/50) featured narrative arcs progressing from depressive states toward resolution, compared with 14% (7/50) of API outputs. App videos brightened over time (slope = 2.90 brightness units/second vs. -0.18 for API; d = 1.59, q < .001) and contained three times more motion (d = 2.07, q < .001). Across both modalities, videos converged on a narrow visual vocabulary and featured recurring objects including hoodies (n=194), windows (n=148), and rain (n=83). Figures were predominantly young adults (88% aged 20-30) and nearly always alone (98%). Gender varied by access point: App outputs skewed male (68%), API outputs skewed female (59%). Sora 2 does not invent new visual grammars for depression but compresses and recombines cultural iconographies, while platform-level constraints substantially shape which narratives reach users. Clinicians should be aware that AI-generated mental health video content reflects training data and platform design rather than clinical knowledge, and that patients may encounter such content during vulnerable periods.

摘要：生成視頻模型越來越能夠生產複雜的心理健康經歷描繪，但對於這些系統如何表現抑鬱症等情況知之甚少。這項研究描述了OpenAI的Sora 2生成視頻模型如何描繪抑鬱症，並檢查了消費者應用程序和開發者API接入點之間的描繪是否存在差異。我們使用單詞提示“抑鬱症”在兩個接入點生成了100個視頻：消費者應用程序（n=50）和開發者API（n=50）。兩位受過訓練的編碼員獨立編碼了敘事結構、視覺環境、物體、人物人口統計和人物狀態。從視覺美學、音頻、語義內容和時間動態中提取並比較了計算特徵。應用程序生成的視頻顯示出明顯的恢復偏見：78%（39/50）展示了從抑鬱狀態朝向解決的敘事弧，相較於API輸出的14%（7/50）。應用程序視頻隨著時間變亮（斜率=2.90亮度單位/秒，API為-0.18；d=1.59，q < .001），並且包含了三倍的運動（d=2.07，q < .001）。在兩種模式下，視頻收斂於狹窄的視覺詞彙，並且出現了重複的物體，包括連帽衫（n=194）、窗戶（n=148）和雨（n=83）。人物主要是年輕成年人（88%年齡在20-30歲之間），幾乎總是獨自一人（98%）。性別因接入點而異：應用程序輸出偏向男性（68%），API輸出偏向女性（59%）。Sora 2並不為抑鬱症創造新的視覺語法，而是壓縮並重新組合文化圖標，同時平台級別的限制在很大程度上塑造了哪些敘事能夠到達用戶。臨床醫生應該意識到，AI生成的心理健康視頻內容反映了訓練數據和平台設計，而非臨床知識，並且患者可能在脆弱時期遇到這類內容。

docs.title: FedAgain: A Trust-Based and Robust Federated Learning Strategy for an Automated Kidney Stone Identification in Ureteroscopy
docs.text:
2603.19512v1 by Ivan Reyes-Amezcua, Francisco Lopez-Tiro, Clément Larose, Christian Daul, Andres Mendez-Vazquez, Gilberto Ochoa-Ruiz

The reliability of artificial intelligence (AI) in medical imaging critically depends on its robustness to heterogeneous and corrupted images acquired with diverse devices across different hospitals which is highly challenging. Therefore, this paper introduces FedAgain, a trust-based Federated Learning (Federated Learning) strategy designed to enhance robustness and generalization for automated kidney stone identification from endoscopic images. FedAgain integrates a dual trust mechanism that combines benchmark reliability and model divergence to dynamically weight client contributions, mitigating the impact of noisy or adversarial updates during aggregation. The framework enables the training of collaborative models across multiple institutions while preserving data privacy and promoting stable convergence under real-world conditions. Extensive experiments across five datasets, including two canonical benchmarks (MNIST and CIFAR-10), two private multi-institutional kidney stone datasets, and one public dataset (MyStone), demonstrate that FedAgain consistently outperforms standard Federated Learning baselines under non-identically and independently distributed (non-IID) data and corrupted-client scenarios. By maintaining diagnostic accuracy and performance stability under varying conditions, FedAgain represents a practical advance toward reliable, privacy-preserving, and clinically deployable federated AI for medical imaging.

摘要：人工智慧（AI）在醫學影像中的可靠性關鍵依賴於其對於來自不同醫院的多樣設備所獲得的異質和受損影像的穩健性，這是一項極具挑戰性的任務。因此，本文介紹了FedAgain，一種基於信任的聯邦學習（Federated Learning）策略，旨在增強自動腎結石識別從內視鏡影像的穩健性和泛化能力。FedAgain整合了一種雙重信任機制，結合基準可靠性和模型差異性，動態加權客戶貢獻，減輕聚合過程中噪音或對抗性更新的影響。該框架使得在多個機構之間訓練協作模型成為可能，同時保護數據隱私並促進在現實條件下的穩定收斂。在五個數據集上進行的廣泛實驗，包括兩個經典基準（MNIST和CIFAR-10）、兩個私有多機構腎結石數據集和一個公共數據集（MyStone），顯示FedAgain在非獨立同分佈（non-IID）數據和受損客戶場景下，始終優於標準聯邦學習基準。通過在變化條件下保持診斷準確性和性能穩定性，FedAgain代表了朝著可靠、保護隱私且可臨床部署的醫學影像聯邦AI邁出的實際進步。

docs.title: Beyond the Desk: Barriers and Future Opportunities for AI to Assist Scientists in Embodied Physical Tasks
docs.text:
2603.19504v1 by Irene Hou, Alexander Qin, Lauren Cheng, Philip J. Guo

More scientists are now using AI, but prior studies have examined only how they use it 'at the desk' for computer-based work. However, given that scientific work often happens 'beyond the desk' at lab and field sites, we conducted the first study of how scientific practitioners use AI for embodied physical tasks. We interviewed 12 scientific practitioners doing hands-on lab and fieldwork in domains like nuclear fusion, primate cognition, and biochemistry, and found three barriers to AI adoption in these settings: 1) experimental setups are too high-stakes to risk AI errors, 2) constrained environments make it hard to use AI, and 3) AI cannot match the tacit knowledge of humans. Participants then developed speculative designs for future AI assistants to 1) monitor task status, 2) organize lab-wide knowledge, 3) monitor scientists' health, 4) do field scouting, 5) do hands-on chores. Our findings point toward AI as background infrastructure to support physical work rather than replacing human expertise.

摘要：越來越多的科學家現在正在使用人工智慧，但之前的研究僅考察了他們如何在「桌面」上進行基於電腦的工作。然而，考慮到科學工作通常在實驗室和現場進行「超越桌面」，我們進行了首次研究，探討科學從業者如何將人工智慧應用於具體的實體任務。我們訪問了12位在核融合、靈長類認知和生物化學等領域從事實驗室和現場工作的科學從業者，並發現了這些環境中人工智慧採用的三個障礙：1）實驗設置的風險太高，不敢冒人工智慧出錯的風險，2）受限的環境使得使用人工智慧變得困難，3）人工智慧無法匹敵人類的隱性知識。參與者隨後為未來的人工智慧助手開發了推測性設計，以1）監控任務狀態，2）組織實驗室內的知識，3）監控科學家的健康，4）進行現場勘查，5）執行實際的雜務。我們的研究結果表明，人工智慧應作為支持實體工作的背景基礎設施，而不是取代人類專業知識。

docs.title: Vocabulary shapes cross-lingual variation of word-order learnability in language models
docs.text:
2603.19427v1 by Jonas Mayer Martins, Jaap Jumelet, Viola Priesemann, Lisa Beinborn

Why do some languages like Czech permit free word order, while others like English do not? We address this question by pretraining transformer language models on a spectrum of synthetic word-order variants of natural languages. We observe that greater word-order irregularity consistently raises model surprisal, indicating reduced learnability. Sentence reversal, however, affects learnability only weakly. A coarse distinction of free- (e.g., Czech and Finnish) and fixed-word-order languages (e.g., English and French) does not explain cross-lingual variation. Instead, the structure of the word and subword vocabulary strongly predicts the model surprisal. Overall, vocabulary structure emerges as a key driver of computational word-order learnability across languages.

摘要：為什麼某些語言如捷克語允許自由的詞序，而其他語言如英語則不允許？我們通過在一系列合成的自然語言詞序變體上預訓練Transformer語言模型來解決這個問題。我們觀察到，更大的詞序不規則性持續提高模型的驚訝度，顯示學習能力降低。然而，句子反轉對學習能力的影響僅微弱。對自由詞序（例如捷克語和芬蘭語）和固定詞序語言（例如英語和法語）進行粗略區分並不能解釋跨語言的變異。相反，詞彙和子詞彙的結構強烈預測模型的驚訝度。總體而言，詞彙結構成為跨語言計算詞序學習能力的關鍵驅動因素。

docs.title: Agentic Business Process Management: A Research Manifesto
docs.text:
2603.18916v2 by Diego Calvanese, Angelo Casciani, Giuseppe De Giacomo, Marlon Dumas, Fabiana Fournier, Timotheus Kampik, Emanuele La Malfa, Lior Limonad, Andrea Marrella, Andreas Metzger, Marco Montali, Daniel Amyot, Peter Fettke, Artem Polyvyanyy, Stefanie Rinderle-Ma, Sebastian Sardiña, Niek Tax, Barbara Weber

This paper presents a manifesto that articulates the conceptual foundations of Agentic Business Process Management (APM), an extension of Business Process Management (BPM) for governing autonomous agents executing processes in organizations. From a management perspective, APM represents a paradigm shift from the traditional process view of the business process, driven by the realization of process awareness and an agent-oriented abstraction, where software and human agents act as primary functional entities that perceive, reason, and act within explicit process frames. This perspective marks a shift from traditional, automation-oriented BPM toward systems in which autonomy is constrained, aligned, and made operational through process awareness. We introduce the core abstractions and architectural elements required to realize APM systems and elaborate on four key capabilities that such APM agents must support: framed autonomy, explainability, conversational actionability, and self-modification. These capabilities jointly ensure that agents' goals are aligned with organizational goals and that agents behave in a framed yet proactive manner in pursuing those goals. We discuss the extent to which the capabilities can be realized and identify research challenges whose resolution requires further advances in BPM, AI, and multi-agent systems. The manifesto thus serves as a roadmap for bridging these communities and for guiding the development of APM systems in practice.

摘要：本論文提出了一份宣言，闡述了代理商業流程管理（Agentic Business Process Management, APM）的概念基礎，這是商業流程管理（Business Process Management, BPM）的延伸，旨在治理在組織中執行流程的自主代理。從管理的角度來看，APM 代表了一種從傳統業務流程觀的範式轉變，這一轉變是由於對流程意識的認識和以代理為導向的抽象，軟體和人類代理作為主要的功能實體，在明確的流程框架內感知、推理和行動。這一觀點標誌著從傳統的自動化導向 BPM 向自主性受到約束、對齊並通過流程意識實現運作的系統的轉變。 我們介紹了實現 APM 系統所需的核心抽象和架構元素，並詳細闡述了這些 APM 代理必須支持的四個關鍵能力：框架自主性、可解釋性、對話可行性和自我修改。這些能力共同確保代理的目標與組織目標對齊，並且代理在追求這些目標時以框架化但積極的方式行為。我們討論了這些能力可以實現的程度，並確定了解決這些挑戰所需的研究挑戰，這些挑戰需要在 BPM、人工智慧和多代理系統方面進一步的進展。因此，這份宣言作為橋接這些社群的路線圖，並指導 APM 系統在實踐中的發展。

docs.title: Progressive Training for Explainable Citation-Grounded Dialogue: Reducing Hallucination to Zero in English-Hindi LLMs
docs.text:
2603.18911v1 by Vedant Pandya

Knowledge-grounded dialogue systems aim to generate informative, contextually relevant responses by conditioning on external knowledge sources. However, most existing approaches focus exclusively on English, lack explicit citation mechanisms for verifying factual claims, and offer limited transparency into model decision-making. We present XKD-Dial, a progressive four-stage training pipeline for explainable, knowledge-grounded dialogue generation in a bilingual (English-Hindi) setting, comprising: (1) multilingual adaptation, (2) English dialogue SFT with citation grounding, (3) bilingual dialogue SFT, and (4) GRPO alignment with citation-aware rewards. We evaluate six models spanning encoder-decoder (250M-3B) and decoder-only (1B-7B) architectures at every pipeline stage. Our key contributions are: (i) three post-hoc explainability analyses - cross-attention alignment, Integrated Gradients attribution, and occlusion-based causal grounding - applied systematically across the training trajectory to reveal how citation behaviour is learned, not only whether it is learned; (ii) citation-grounded SFT reduces hallucination to 0.0% for encoder-decoder models from Stage 2 onward; (iii) the progressive pipeline prevents catastrophic forgetting while improving Hindi capabilities; (iv) smaller models match larger models on English after SFT; and (v) GRPO provides marginal improvement over well-designed SFT for structured citation tasks. We evaluate across six automatic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE, BERTScore, FactScore, Citation-F1, and hallucination rate).

摘要：知識基礎的對話系統旨在通過依賴外部知識來源來生成信息豐富且與上下文相關的回應。然而，大多數現有的方法僅專注於英語，缺乏驗證事實主張的明確引用機制，並且對模型決策過程的透明度有限。我們提出了XKD-Dial，一個進步的四階段訓練流程，用於在雙語（英語-印地語）環境中進行可解釋的知識基礎對話生成，包含：(1) 多語言適應，(2) 帶有引用基礎的英語對話SFT，(3) 雙語對話SFT，以及(4) 帶有引用意識獎勵的GRPO對齊。我們在每個流程階段評估了六個模型，涵蓋編碼器-解碼器（250M-3B）和僅解碼器（1B-7B）架構。我們的主要貢獻包括：(i) 三種事後可解釋性分析 - 交叉注意力對齊、集成梯度歸因和基於遮蔽的因果基礎 - 系統性地應用於訓練過程中，以揭示引用行為是如何學習的，而不僅僅是學習了什麼；(ii) 引用基礎的SFT將編碼器-解碼器模型的幻覺率從第二階段開始降低至0.0%；(iii) 進步的流程防止了災難性遺忘，同時改善了印地語能力；(iv) 小型模型在SFT後在英語上與大型模型相匹配；以及(v) GRPO在結構化引用任務上對精心設計的SFT提供了邊際改進。我們在六個自動指標（BLEU、ROUGE、BERTScore、FactScore、Citation-F1和幻覺率）上進行評估。

docs.title: Translating MRI to PET through Conditional Diffusion Models with Enhanced Pathology Awareness
docs.text:
2603.18896v1 by Yitong Li, Igor Yakushev, Dennis M. Hedderich, Christian Wachinger

Positron emission tomography (PET) is a widely recognized technique for diagnosing neurodegenerative diseases, offering critical functional insights. However, its high costs and radiation exposure hinder its widespread use. In contrast, magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) does not involve such limitations. While MRI also detects neurodegenerative changes, it is less sensitive for diagnosis compared to PET. To overcome such limitations, one approach is to generate synthetic PET from MRI. Recent advances in generative models have paved the way for cross-modality medical image translation; however, existing methods largely emphasize structural preservation while neglecting the critical need for pathology awareness. To address this gap, we propose PASTA, a novel image translation framework built on conditional diffusion models with enhanced pathology awareness. PASTA surpasses state-of-the-art methods by preserving both structural and pathological details through its highly interactive dual-arm architecture and multi-modal condition integration. Additionally, we introduce a novel cycle exchange consistency and volumetric generation strategy that significantly enhances PASTA's ability to produce high-quality 3D PET images. Our qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate the high quality and pathology awareness of the synthesized PET scans. For Alzheimer's diagnosis, the performance of these synthesized scans improves over MRI by 4%, almost reaching the performance of actual PET. Our code is available at https://github.com/ai-med/PASTA.

摘要：正電子發射斷層掃描（PET）是一種廣泛認可的神經退行性疾病診斷技術，提供關鍵的功能性洞察。然而，其高昂的成本和輻射暴露阻礙了其廣泛使用。相比之下，磁共振成像（MRI）不涉及這些限制。雖然MRI也能檢測神經退行性變化，但與PET相比，其診斷的敏感性較低。為了克服這些限制，一種方法是從MRI生成合成的PET。最近在生成模型方面的進展為跨模態醫學影像轉換鋪平了道路；然而，現有方法主要強調結構保留，而忽略了對病理意識的關鍵需求。為了解決這一空白，我們提出了PASTA，一個基於條件擴散模型的新型影像轉換框架，具有增強的病理意識。PASTA通過其高度互動的雙臂架構和多模態條件整合，超越了最先進的方法，保留了結構和病理細節。此外，我們引入了一種新穎的循環交換一致性和體積生成策略，顯著增強了PASTA生成高質量3D PET影像的能力。我們的定性和定量結果顯示合成的PET掃描具有高質量和病理意識。在阿茲海默症的診斷中，這些合成掃描的表現比MRI提高了4%，幾乎達到了實際PET的性能。我們的代碼可在https://github.com/ai-med/PASTA獲得。

docs.title: WeNLEX: Weakly Supervised Natural Language Explanations for Multilabel Chest X-ray Classification
docs.text:
2603.18752v1 by Isabel Rio-Torto, Jaime S. Cardoso, Luís F. Teixeira

Natural language explanations provide an inherently human-understandable way to explain black-box models, closely reflecting how radiologists convey their diagnoses in textual reports. Most works explicitly supervise the explanation generation process using datasets annotated with explanations. Thus, though plausible, the generated explanations are not faithful to the model's reasoning. In this work, we propose WeNLEX, a weakly supervised model for the generation of natural language explanations for multilabel chest X-ray classification. Faithfulness is ensured by matching images generated from their corresponding natural language explanations with original images, in the black-box model's feature space. Plausibility is maintained via distribution alignment with a small database of clinician-annotated explanations. We empirically demonstrate, through extensive validation on multiple metrics to assess faithfulness, simulatability, diversity, and plausibility, that WeNLEX is able to produce faithful and plausible explanations, using as little as 5 ground-truth explanations per diagnosis. Furthermore, WeNLEX can operate in both post-hoc and in-model settings. In the latter, i.e., when the multilabel classifier is trained together with the rest of the network, WeNLEX improves the classification AUC of the standalone classifier by 2.21%, thus showing that adding interpretability to the training process can actually increase the downstream task performance. Additionally, simply by changing the database, WeNLEX explanations are adaptable to any target audience, and we showcase this flexibility by training a layman version of WeNLEX, where explanations are simplified for non-medical users.

摘要：自然語言解釋提供了一種本質上易於人類理解的方式來解釋黑箱模型，與放射科醫生在書面報告中傳達診斷的方式密切相關。大多數研究明確地使用帶有解釋的數據集來監督解釋生成過程。因此，儘管生成的解釋看似合理，但它們並不忠實於模型的推理。在這項工作中，我們提出了WeNLEX，一種弱監督模型，用於生成多標籤胸部X光分類的自然語言解釋。通過將從相應自然語言解釋生成的圖像與原始圖像在黑箱模型的特徵空間中進行匹配，來確保忠實性。通過與小型臨床醫生註釋解釋數據庫的分佈對齊來維持合理性。我們通過在多個指標上的廣泛驗證，實證展示了WeNLEX能夠生成忠實且合理的解釋，每個診斷僅需使用5個真實解釋。此外，WeNLEX可以在事後和模型內設置中運行。在後者，即當多標籤分類器與其餘網絡一起訓練時，WeNLEX提高了獨立分類器的分類AUC達2.21%，從而表明將可解釋性添加到訓練過程中實際上可以提高下游任務的性能。此外，僅通過更改數據庫，WeNLEX的解釋可以適應任何目標受眾，我們通過訓練一個簡化版的WeNLEX來展示這種靈活性，該版本的解釋針對非醫療用戶進行了簡化。

docs.title: ICE: Intervention-Consistent Explanation Evaluation with Statistical Grounding for LLMs
docs.text:
2603.18579v1 by Abhinaba Basu, Pavan Chakraborty

Evaluating whether explanations faithfully reflect a model's reasoning remains an open problem. Existing benchmarks use single interventions without statistical testing, making it impossible to distinguish genuine faithfulness from chance-level performance. We introduce ICE (Intervention-Consistent Explanation), a framework that compares explanations against matched random baselines via randomization tests under multiple intervention operators, yielding win rates with confidence intervals. Evaluating 7 LLMs across 4 English tasks, 6 non-English languages, and 2 attribution methods, we find that faithfulness is operator-dependent: operator gaps reach up to 44 percentage points, with deletion typically inflating estimates on short text but the pattern reversing on long text, suggesting that faithfulness should be interpreted comparatively across intervention operators rather than as a single score. Randomized baselines reveal anti-faithfulness in one-third of configurations, and faithfulness shows zero correlation with human plausibility (|r| < 0.04). Multilingual evaluation reveals dramatic model-language interactions not explained by tokenization alone. We release the ICE framework and ICEBench benchmark.

摘要：評估解釋是否忠實反映模型的推理仍然是一個未解決的問題。現有的基準使用單一干預而不進行統計測試，使得無法區分真實的忠實度與偶然的表現。我們引入了ICE（干預一致解釋），這是一個通過隨機化測試在多個干預操作下將解釋與匹配的隨機基準進行比較的框架，產生帶有置信區間的勝率。在4個英語任務、6種非英語語言和2種歸因方法中評估了7個LLM，我們發現忠實度依賴於操作符：操作符之間的差距可達44個百分點，刪除通常會在短文本上膨脹估計，但在長文本上模式則相反，這表明忠實度應該在不同的干預操作符之間進行比較解釋，而不是作為單一分數。隨機基準顯示在三分之一的配置中存在反忠實度，且忠實度與人類合理性之間顯示出零相關性（|r| < 0.04）。多語言評估揭示了劇烈的模型-語言互動，這無法僅通過標記化解釋。我們發布了ICE框架和ICEBench基準。

docs.title: MedForge: Interpretable Medical Deepfake Detection via Forgery-aware Reasoning
docs.text:
2603.18577v1 by Zhihui Chen, Kai He, Qingyuan Lei, Bin Pu, Jian Zhang, Yuling Xu, Mengling Feng

Text-guided image editors can now manipulate authentic medical scans with high fidelity, enabling lesion implantation/removal that threatens clinical trust and safety. Existing defenses are inadequate for healthcare. Medical detectors are largely black-box, while MLLM-based explainers are typically post-hoc, lack medical expertise, and may hallucinate evidence on ambiguous cases. We present MedForge, a data-and-method solution for pre-hoc, evidence-grounded medical forgery detection. We introduce MedForge-90K, a large-scale benchmark of realistic lesion edits across 19 pathologies with expert-guided reasoning supervision via doctor inspection guidelines and gold edit locations. Building on it, MedForge-Reasoner performs localize-then-analyze reasoning, predicting suspicious regions before producing a verdict, and is further aligned with Forgery-aware GSPO to strengthen grounding and reduce hallucinations. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art detection accuracy and trustworthy, expert-aligned explanations.

摘要：文本引導的影像編輯器現在可以高保真地操控真實的醫療掃描，實現可能威脅臨床信任和安全的病變植入/移除。現有的防禦措施對於醫療保健來說是不足的。醫療檢測器在很大程度上是黑箱，而基於MLLM的解釋器通常是事後的，缺乏醫學專業知識，並且在模糊案例中可能會產生幻覺證據。我們提出了MedForge，一個基於數據和方法的解決方案，用於前置的、有證據基礎的醫療偽造檢測。我們介紹了MedForge-90K，一個涵蓋19種病理的現實病變編輯的大規模基準，並通過醫生檢查指南和金標編輯位置進行專家引導的推理監督。在此基礎上，MedForge-Reasoner執行定位後分析的推理，在產出判決之前預測可疑區域，並進一步與偽造意識的GSPO對齊，以加強基礎並減少幻覺。實驗顯示出最先進的檢測準確性和可信的、專家對齊的解釋。

docs.title: WASD: Locating Critical Neurons as Sufficient Conditions for Explaining and Controlling LLM Behavior
docs.text:
2603.18474v1 by Haonan Yu, Junhao Liu, Zhenyu Yan, Haoran Lin, Xin Zhang

Precise behavioral control of large language models (LLMs) is critical for complex applications. However, existing methods often incur high training costs, lack natural language controllability, or compromise semantic coherence. To bridge this gap, we propose WASD (unWeaving Actionable Sufficient Directives), a novel framework that explains model behavior by identifying sufficient neural conditions for token generation. Our method represents candidate conditions as neuron-activation predicates and iteratively searches for a minimal set that guarantees the current output under input perturbations. Experiments on SST-2 and CounterFact with the Gemma-2-2B model demonstrate that our approach produces explanations that are more stable, accurate, and concise than conventional attribution graphs. Moreover, through a case study on controlling cross-lingual output generation, we validated the practical effectiveness of WASD in controlling model behavior.

摘要：精確控制大型語言模型（LLMs）的行為對於複雜應用至關重要。然而，現有的方法往往需要高昂的訓練成本，缺乏自然語言的可控性，或妥協於語義的一致性。為了彌補這一差距，我們提出了WASD（unWeaving Actionable Sufficient Directives），這是一個新穎的框架，通過識別生成標記的充分神經條件來解釋模型行為。我們的方法將候選條件表示為神經元激活謂詞，並迭代搜索一組最小條件，以保證在輸入擾動下當前輸出。在SST-2和CounterFact上使用Gemma-2-2B模型的實驗表明，我們的方法產生的解釋比傳統的歸因圖更穩定、準確且簡潔。此外，通過對跨語言輸出生成控制的案例研究，我們驗證了WASD在控制模型行為方面的實際有效性。

docs.title: Interpretability without actionability: mechanistic methods cannot correct language model errors despite near-perfect internal representations
docs.text:
2603.18353v1 by Sanjay Basu, Sadiq Y. Patel, Parth Sheth, Bhairavi Muralidharan, Namrata Elamaran, Aakriti Kinra, John Morgan, Rajaie Batniji

Language models encode task-relevant knowledge in internal representations that far exceeds their output performance, but whether mechanistic interpretability methods can bridge this knowledge-action gap has not been systematically tested. We compared four mechanistic interpretability methods -- concept bottleneck steering (Steerling-8B), sparse autoencoder feature steering, logit lens with activation patching, and linear probing with truthfulness separator vector steering (Qwen 2.5 7B Instruct) -- for correcting false-negative triage errors using 400 physician-adjudicated clinical vignettes (144 hazards, 256 benign). Linear probes discriminated hazardous from benign cases with 98.2% AUROC, yet the model's output sensitivity was only 45.1%, a 53-percentage-point knowledge-action gap. Concept bottleneck steering corrected 20% of missed hazards but disrupted 53% of correct detections, indistinguishable from random perturbation (p=0.84). SAE feature steering produced zero effect despite 3,695 significant features. TSV steering at high strength corrected 24% of missed hazards while disrupting 6% of correct detections, but left 76% of errors uncorrected. Current mechanistic interpretability methods cannot reliably translate internal knowledge into corrected outputs, with implications for AI safety frameworks that assume interpretability enables effective error correction.

摘要：語言模型在內部表示中編碼與任務相關的知識，這些知識遠超過它們的輸出性能，但機械解釋方法是否能彌合這一知識與行動之間的差距尚未經過系統性測試。我們比較了四種機械解釋方法——概念瓶頸引導（Steerling-8B）、稀疏自編碼器特徵引導、帶有激活修補的邏輯透鏡，以及使用真實性分隔向量引導的線性探測（Qwen 2.5 7B Instruct）——以糾正使用400個醫生裁定的臨床小插曲（144個危險、256個良性）的假陰性分流錯誤。線性探測以98.2%的AUROC區分危險與良性案例，但模型的輸出靈敏度僅為45.1%，知識與行動之間存在53個百分點的差距。概念瓶頸引導糾正了20%的漏檢危險，但擾亂了53%的正確檢測，與隨機擾動無法區分（p=0.84）。儘管有3,695個顯著特徵，SAE特徵引導產生了零效果。高強度的TSV引導糾正了24%的漏檢危險，同時擾亂了6%的正確檢測，但仍有76%的錯誤未被糾正。目前的機械解釋方法無法可靠地將內部知識轉化為糾正的輸出，這對假設可解釋性能夠有效糾正錯誤的AI安全框架有重要影響。

docs.title: FaithSteer-BENCH: A Deployment-Aligned Stress-Testing Benchmark for Inference-Time Steering
docs.text:
2603.18329v1 by Zikang Ding, Qiying Hu, Yi Zhang, Hongji Li, Junchi Yao, Hongbo Liu, Lijie Hu

Inference-time steering is widely regarded as a lightweight and parameter-free mechanism for controlling large language model (LLM) behavior, and prior work has often suggested that simple activation-level interventions can reliably induce targeted behavioral changes. However, such conclusions are typically drawn under relatively relaxed evaluation settings that overlook deployment constraints, capability trade-offs, and real-world robustness. We therefore introduce \textbf{FaithSteer-BENCH}, a stress-testing benchmark that evaluates steering methods at a fixed deployment-style operating point through three gate-wise criteria: controllability, utility preservation, and robustness. Across multiple models and representative steering approaches, we uncover several systematic failure modes that are largely obscured under standard evaluation, including illusory controllability, measurable cognitive tax on unrelated capabilities, and substantial brittleness under mild instruction-level perturbations, role prompts, encoding transformations, and data scarcity. Gate-wise benchmark results show that existing methods do not necessarily provide reliable controllability in deployment-oriented practical settings. In addition, mechanism-level diagnostics indicate that many steering methods induce prompt-conditional alignment rather than stable latent directional shifts, further explaining their fragility under stress. FaithSteer-BENCH therefore provides a unified benchmark and a clearer analytical lens for future method design, reliability evaluation, and deployment-oriented research in steering.

摘要：推理時間的引導被廣泛認為是一種輕量且無參數的機制，用於控制大型語言模型（LLM）的行為，先前的研究經常建議，簡單的激活水平干預可以可靠地引發目標行為的變化。然而，這些結論通常是在相對放鬆的評估環境下得出的，忽略了部署限制、能力權衡和現實世界的穩健性。因此，我們介紹了\textbf{FaithSteer-BENCH}，這是一個壓力測試基準，通過三個門控標準來評估引導方法在固定的部署風格操作點上的表現：可控性、效用保留和穩健性。在多個模型和代表性的引導方法中，我們發現了幾種系統性失效模式，這些模式在標準評估下大多被掩蓋，包括虛幻的可控性、對無關能力的可測認知負擔，以及在輕微的指令級擾動、角色提示、編碼轉換和數據稀缺下的顯著脆弱性。門控基準結果顯示，現有方法在以部署為導向的實際環境中不一定提供可靠的可控性。此外，機制層級的診斷表明，許多引導方法引發的是基於提示的條件對齊，而非穩定的潛在方向性變化，進一步解釋了它們在壓力下的脆弱性。因此，FaithSteer-BENCH提供了一個統一的基準和更清晰的分析視角，供未來的方法設計、可靠性評估和以部署為導向的引導研究使用。

docs.title: Consumer-to-Clinical Language Shifts in Ambient AI Draft Notes and Clinician-Finalized Documentation: A Multi-level Analysis
docs.text:
2603.18327v1 by Ha Na Cho, Yawen Guo, Sairam Sutari, Emilie Chow, Steven Tam, Danielle Perret, Deepti Pandita, Kai Zheng

Ambient AI generates draft clinical notes from patient-clinician conversations, often using lay or consumer-oriented phrasing to support patient understanding instead of standardized clinical terminology. How clinicians revise these drafts for professional documentation conventions remains unclear. We quantified clinician editing for consumer-to- clinical normalization using a dictionary-confirmed transformation framework. We analyzed 71,173 AI-draft and finalized-note section pairs from 34,726 encounters. Confirmed transformations were defined as replacing a consumer expression with its dictionary-mapped clinical equivalent in the same section. Editing significantly reduced terminology density across all sections (p < 0.001). The Assessment and Plan accounted for the largest transformation volume (59.3%). Our analysis identified 7,576 transformation events across 4,114 note sections (5.8%), representing 1.2% consumer-term deletions. Transformation intensity varied across individual clinicians (p < 0.001). Overall, clinician post-editing demonstrates consistent shifts from conversational phrasing toward standardized, section- appropriate clinical terminology, supporting section-aware ambient AI design.

摘要：環境人工智慧從病人與臨床醫師的對話中生成草擬的臨床筆記，通常使用通俗或消費者導向的措辭來支持病人的理解，而不是標準化的臨床術語。臨床醫師如何修訂這些草稿以符合專業文檔慣例仍不清楚。我們使用字典確認的轉換框架量化了臨床醫師在消費者到臨床的標準化編輯。我們分析了來自34,726次就診的71,173對AI草稿和最終筆記部分。確認的轉換被定義為在同一部分中用其字典映射的臨床等價詞替換消費者表達。編輯顯著減少了所有部分的術語密度（p < 0.001）。評估和計劃部分佔據了最大的轉換量（59.3%）。我們的分析識別了4,114個筆記部分中的7,576個轉換事件（5.8%），代表1.2%的消費者術語刪除。轉換強度在不同的臨床醫師之間有所不同（p < 0.001）。總體而言，臨床醫師的後編輯顯示出從對話措辭向標準化、部分適當的臨床術語的一致轉變，支持了具備部分意識的環境人工智慧設計。

docs.title: The Validity Gap in Health AI Evaluation: A Cross-Sectional Analysis of Benchmark Composition
docs.text:
2603.18294v1 by Alvin Rajkomar, Pavan Sudarshan, Angela Lai, Lily Peng

Background: Clinical trials rely on transparent inclusion criteria to ensure generalizability. In contrast, benchmarks validating health-related large language models (LLMs) rarely characterize the "patient" or "query" populations they contain. Without defined composition, aggregate performance metrics may misrepresent model readiness for clinical use. Methods: We analyzed 18,707 consumer health queries across six public benchmarks using LLMs as automated coding instruments to apply a standardized 16-field taxonomy profiling context, topic, and intent. Results: We identified a structural "validity gap." While benchmarks have evolved from static retrieval to interactive dialogue, clinical composition remains misaligned with real-world needs. Although 42% of the corpus referenced objective data, this was polarized toward wellness-focused wearable signals (17.7%); complex diagnostic inputs remained rare, including laboratory values (5.2%), imaging (3.8%), and raw medical records (0.6%). Safety-critical scenarios were effectively absent: suicide/self-harm queries comprised <0.7% of the corpus and chronic disease management only 5.5%. Benchmarks also neglected vulnerable populations (pediatrics/older adults <11%) and global health needs. Conclusions: Evaluation benchmarks remain misaligned with real-world clinical needs, lacking raw clinical artifacts, adequate representation of vulnerable populations, and longitudinal chronic care scenarios. The field must adopt standardized query profiling--analogous to clinical trial reporting--to align evaluation with the full complexity of clinical practice.

摘要：背景：臨床試驗依賴透明的納入標準以確保普遍性。相對而言，驗證健康相關大型語言模型（LLMs）的基準很少描述其所包含的「患者」或「查詢」人群。沒有明確的組成，總體性能指標可能會錯誤地表現模型在臨床使用上的準備程度。方法：我們分析了在六個公共基準中使用LLMs作為自動編碼工具的18,707個消費者健康查詢，應用標準化的16個領域分類法來描述上下文、主題和意圖。結果：我們識別出一個結構性的「有效性差距」。儘管基準已從靜態檢索發展到互動對話，但臨床組成仍與現實世界的需求不匹配。雖然42%的語料庫提及客觀數據，但這些數據偏向於以健康為重點的可穿戴信號（17.7%）；複雜的診斷輸入仍然罕見，包括實驗室數值（5.2%）、影像學（3.8%）和原始醫療記錄（0.6%）。安全關鍵的場景幾乎不存在：自殺/自我傷害查詢佔語料庫的比例<0.7%，慢性病管理僅佔5.5%。基準也忽視了脆弱人群（兒科/老年人<11%）和全球健康需求。結論：評估基準與現實世界的臨床需求不匹配，缺乏原始臨床文物、足夠的脆弱人群代表性和長期慢性護理場景。該領域必須採用標準化的查詢描述——類似於臨床試驗報告——以使評估與臨床實踐的全貌相符。

docs.title: Final Report for the Workshop on Robotics & AI in Medicine
docs.text:
2603.18130v1 by Juan P Wachs

The CARE Workshop on Robotics and AI in Medicine, held on December 1, 2025 in Indianapolis, convened leading researchers, clinicians, industry innovators, and federal stakeholders to shape a national vision for advancing robotics and artificial intelligence in healthcare. The event highlighted the accelerating need for coordinated research efforts that bridge engineering innovation with real clinical priorities, emphasizing safety, reliability, and translational readiness with an emphasis on the use of robotics and AI to achieve this readiness goal. Across keynotes, panels, and breakout sessions, participants underscored critical gaps in data availability, standardized evaluation methods, regulatory pathways, and workforce training that hinder the deployment of intelligent robotic systems in surgical, diagnostic, rehabilitative, and assistive contexts. Discussions emphasized the transformative potential of AI enabled robotics to improve precision, reduce provider burden, expand access to specialized care, and enhance patient outcomes particularly in undeserved regions and high risk procedural domains. Special attention was given to austere settings, disaster and relief and military settings. The workshop demonstrated broad consensus on the urgency of establishing a national Center for AI and Robotic Excellence in medicine (CARE). Stakeholders identified priority research thrusts including human robot collaboration, trustworthy autonomy, simulation and digital twins, multi modal sensing, and ethical integration of generative AI into clinical workflows. Participants also articulated the need for high quality datasets, shared test beds, autonomous surgical systems, clinically grounded benchmarks, and sustained interdisciplinary training mechanisms.

摘要：醫療領域的機器人與人工智慧研討會於2025年12月1日在印第安納波利斯舉行，聚集了領先的研究人員、臨床醫生、行業創新者和聯邦利益相關者，共同塑造推進醫療保健中機器人和人工智慧的國家願景。此次活動突顯了協調研究努力的迫切需求，這些努力將工程創新與實際臨床優先事項相結合，強調安全性、可靠性和轉化準備，並著重於利用機器人和人工智慧達成這一準備目標。

在主題演講、小組討論和分組會議中，參與者強調了數據可用性、標準化評估方法、監管途徑和勞動力培訓等關鍵差距，這些差距阻礙了智能機器人系統在外科、診斷、康復和輔助環境中的部署。討論強調了人工智慧驅動的機器人改善精確度、減少提供者負擔、擴大專科護理的可及性以及提高患者結果的變革潛力，特別是在服務不足的地區和高風險程序領域。特別關注了艱困環境、災難與救援以及軍事環境。

研討會顯示出對於在醫療領域建立國家人工智慧與機器人卓越中心（CARE）的迫切性達成了廣泛共識。利益相關者確定了優先研究方向，包括人機協作、可信的自主性、模擬和數位雙胞胎、多模態感知以及將生成性人工智慧倫理整合進臨床工作流程的需求。參與者還表達了對高質量數據集、共享測試平台、自主外科系統、臨床基準和持續跨學科培訓機制的需求。

docs.title: How do LLMs Compute Verbal Confidence
docs.text:
2603.17839v1 by Dharshan Kumaran, Arthur Conmy, Federico Barbero, Simon Osindero, Viorica Patraucean, Petar Velickovic

Verbal confidence -- prompting LLMs to state their confidence as a number or category -- is widely used to extract uncertainty estimates from black-box models. However, how LLMs internally generate such scores remains unknown. We address two questions: first, when confidence is computed - just-in-time when requested, or automatically during answer generation and cached for later retrieval; and second, what verbal confidence represents - token log-probabilities, or a richer evaluation of answer quality? Focusing on Gemma 3 27B and Qwen 2.5 7B, we provide convergent evidence for cached retrieval. Activation steering, patching, noising, and swap experiments reveal that confidence representations emerge at answer-adjacent positions before appearing at the verbalization site. Attention blocking pinpoints the information flow: confidence is gathered from answer tokens, cached at the first post-answer position, then retrieved for output.
